text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Damn it, I lost! Everyone's going to start
smack-talking me again!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They're always like, "You're too short to do well
in races"... "You're not suited for the turf"... Pisses
me off!
choice_data_list:
Channel that frustration into fuel for your
training!

Channel that frustration into fuel for your
training!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They're always like, "You're too short to do well
in races"... "You're not suited for the turf"... Pisses
me off!
choice_data_list:
Channel that frustration into fuel for your
training!

Channel that frustration into fuel for your
training!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, whatever! I don't need your pity!
choice_data_list: It's not pity! I really do believe in you!
It's not pity! I really do believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
How can you be so sure of me when I have
nothing to show for it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
All you say is that you believe in me whenever I
lose.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Honestly, I don't believe you when you say that!
choice_data_list:
Then let me tell you why I'm so confident in
you!

text_block_list.text:
If she doesn't trust me, then I'll just have to
explain everything until she does.

Her competitive spirit and relentless
determination, not to mention her final sprint, are
her strengths. I'm expounding on her acceptance
of and devotion to overcoming her weaknesses,
when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Stop! Geez, okay! I get it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win next time just so I don't have to
go through this again!
Somehow, Narita Taishin's mood has improved.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm sick and tired of being looked down on all the
time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll blow past everyone and take first
place!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm just annoyed that I got caught up in your
dumb energy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But, ugh... I guess I need you if I want to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Beef up my training regimen—make it tougher. If
you go easy on me, I'll end you.

Although slightly displeased, Narita Taishin feels
more determined than ever to win her upcoming
race.
